invitation.subject: You're invited to join {{.OrganizationName}}
invitation.title: You're Invited!
invitation.content: You have been invited to join an organization. Click the button below to accept the invitation and get started.

footer.ignore: If you didn't expect this invitation, you can ignore this email.
footer.expiry: This link will expire in {{.TokenTTLDays}} days.

reset.subject: Reset Password
reset.title: Reset Your Password
reset.content: You recently requested to reset your password. Click the button below to reset it.
reset.warning: This password reset link is only valid for the next hour.

footer.ignore: If you didn't request a password reset, please ignore this email and your password will remain unchanged.
footer.link: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste this link into your browser:

verification.subject: Verify Your Email
verification.title: Verify Your Email
verification.content: Thank you for signing up! Please verify your email address by clicking the button below.
verification.warning: This verification link is only valid for the next 24 hours.

footer.ignore: If you didn't create an account, please ignore this email.
footer.link: If the button doesn't work, copy and paste this link into your browser:

500.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again in a moment, or contact support if the issue persists.
500.LOCATION_SEARCH_PROCESSING_ERROR: An error occurred while processing the location search.

422.UNPROCESSABLE_ENTITY: The request contains missing or invalid information. Please review and try again.
422.INVITATION_ALREADY_ACCEPTED: This invitation has already been accepted.
422.USER_ALREADY_MEMBER: This user is already a member.
422.SUBSCRIPTION_CHANGE_FAILED: We couldn't change your plan. Please try again or use the billing portal to manage your subscription.
422.DOWNGRADE_NOT_ALLOWED: Downgrades are not allowed. Cancel your subscription and resubscribe to a lower plan if needed.

409.CONFLICT: The information provided conflicts with existing data. Please review and try again.
409.EMAIL_ALREADY_IN_USE: This email address is already in use.
409.API_KEY_ALREADY_REVOKED: This API key has already been revoked.
409.RESOURCE_ALREADY_ARCHIVED: This resource has already been archived.
409.PADDLE_CUSTOMER_ALREADY_EXISTS: This billing email is already in use by another organization. Please use a different email. If this is your email but you believe it's used incorrectly, please contact us.
409.ROLE_HAS_MEMBERS: This role is assigned to organization members and cannot be deleted. Reassign them under Members first. Assigned emails: {{.memberEmailsText}}.

404.NOT_FOUND: The requested resource could not be found.

403.FORBIDDEN: You do not have permission to access this resource.
403.FEATURE_NOT_INCLUDED: This feature is not included in your current subscription plan.
403.ORGANIZATION_SEATS_LIMIT: Organization seat limit reached. Upgrade your plan to add more members.
403.USER_CANNOT_REMOVE_OWN_MEMBER: You cannot remove yourself from the organization.
403.USER_CANNOT_UPDATE_OWN_MEMBER: You cannot change your own role.
403.INVITATION_EMAIL_MISMATCH: This invitation can only be used with the email address it was sent to.

401.INVALID_TOKEN: Invalid or expired token. Please sign in again.
401.EXPIRED_TOKEN: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
401.INVALID_VERIFICATION_TOKEN: This verification link is invalid or has already been used.
401.EXPIRED_VERIFICATION_TOKEN: This verification link has expired. Please request a new one.
401.INVALID_PASSWORD_RESET_TOKEN: This password reset link is invalid or has already been used.
401.EXPIRED_PASSWORD_RESET_TOKEN: This password reset link has expired. Please request a new one.

400.BAD_REQUEST: The request contains invalid information. Please review and try again.

429.TOO_MANY_REQUESTS: Too many requests have been made. Please wait a moment and try again.
429.LOCATION_SEARCH_TEMPORARY_ERROR: Location search is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.

402.PAYMENT_REQUIRED: Your subscription has ended or requires an update. Please update your subscription to continue.

503.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE: The service is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
